title: Can Make Arithmetic Progression From Sequence
titleCn: 判断能否形成等差数列

testcases.input: arr = [3,5,1] Output: true Explanation: We can reorder the elements as [1,3,5] or [5,3,1] with differences 2 and -2 respectively, between each consecutive elements.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: We can reorder the elements as [1,3,5] or [5,3,1] with differences 2 and -2 respectively, between each consecutive elements.

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,4] Output: false Explanation: There is no way to reorder the elements to obtain an arithmetic progression.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: There is no way to reorder the elements to obtain an arithmetic progression.
